partial.title: Prefer clean-break repository and workflow boundaries
partial.overlayReason: Upstream React Native skills do not encode this repo's chosen architecture direction or clean-break preference.

partial.title: Push toward reusable hooks, components, and smaller files
partial.overlayReason: The repo has explicit line-cap and extraction preferences that are narrower than generic React Native design guidance.

partial.title: Prefer the real native iOS path over lookalikes
partial.overlayReason: Upstream skills cover native feel broadly, but not this repo's explicit 'restore the real native path first' standard.

partial.title: Make profile and settings surfaces feel Apple-native
partial.overlayReason: The repo needs a stronger product-specific default for profile/settings surfaces than the upstream HIG summary alone provides.

partial.title: Prefer native picker patterns over custom stepper controls
partial.overlayReason: The local product rule is stricter than general Android guidance: keep these flows lightweight and native instead of route-heavy.

overlay.title: Keep shell providers thin and out of feature cycles
overlay.overlayReason: This is a repo-specific architectural constraint derived from prior regressions.

overlay.title: Check worktree state before broad structural changes
overlay.overlayReason: This is a workflow rule driven by the user's actual multi-stream working style in this repo.

overlay.title: Start from the exact file, route, or stack trace
overlay.overlayReason: This is a repo-specific debugging workflow preference, not generic mobile guidance.

overlay.title: Separate machine-state failures from repo-state failures
overlay.overlayReason: This is a concrete failure-handling pattern from repeated local iOS build issues in this repo.

overlay.title: Prefer action-first compact rows over low-value status copy
overlay.overlayReason: This is a user-specific product judgment rule, not something upstream design packs can infer.

overlay.title: Prune low-signal data and exact visible clutter aggressively
overlay.overlayReason: This is a strong user-specific product-editing preference derived from repeated screenshot feedback.

overlay.title: Prefer contextual local UI fixes after the shared primitive is proven wrong in-context
overlay.overlayReason: This rule is highly contextual and comes directly from repeated user correction about in-card actions.

overlay.title: Treat blue-accent buttons with white text as a design-system rule
overlay.overlayReason: This is a concrete repo-local visual rule set by the user.
